Prompt Weaver.description: Designed & Developed AI Based Prompt Generator for best usage for LLM by leveraging NLP techniques and general available LLM models. Optimized prompt structuring to improve interactions with LLMs, increasing response quality, efficiency, and coverage for AI writers.

AI Playground – NLP & Agents.description: Explored classical NLP using Gensim’s Word2Vec and similarity models, visualizing embeddings and comparing semantic representations with modern LLM outputs. Built intelligent agents using CAMEL and local LLMs (via Ollama) for multi-agent simulations, including role-based reasoning, task decomposition, and memory-enhanced conversations. Developed modular pipelines with LangChain to demonstrate retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), agent decision trees, and LLM chaining for task-oriented flows.

AlterEgo – AI Based Time Management Appl.description: Designing and Developing AI Time Management Assistant that dynamically help with productivity with features like AI Planner, leveraging LLMs for reasoning and natural language interaction. Integrated LangChain memory buffers and prompt engineering to enable personalized responses, adaptive planning, and context-aware time management suggestions, with minimum token spent.
